work.desc_title: Liturgy for Great Friday from a work of Cyril of Alexandria
Prayers of the Nativity, with some prayers attributed to Ephrem and Isaac the Syrian

note: Many of the Eastern Arabic numerals in the margins throughout the text coincide with the table of contents on f. 2v

work.desc_title: Prayers, invocations, and supplications composed by some of the fathers
